header.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F8F6]/70 border-b border-[#E5E2DC] shadow-sm

cards.classes: bg-white border border-[#E5E2DC] rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#5C745A] text-white hover:bg-[#475F45] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#5C745A]/50 rounded-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F9F8F6] text-[#1C1917] hover:bg-[#E5E2DC] border border-[#E5E2DC] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E5E2DC]/50 rounded-lg
buttons.danger: bg-[#C06B52] text-white hover:bg-[#A35943] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C06B52]/50 rounded-lg

charts.guidelines: Use accessible, color-blind friendly palettes. Prefer #5C745A for income/assets and #C06B52 for expenses/liabilities.

images.description: Hands holding financial documents with calculator and laptop on office desk, business analysis scene. Use for onboarding or empty state background.

animations.list_stagger: framer-motion staggered entrance for transaction lists

accessibility.contrast_ratio: Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text against background
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='upload-statement-button')

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Manrope for all headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Implement the 'Control Room Grid' layout for the dashboard with gap-6.
Cards should have a flat white background, 1px subtle border, and a slight lift (-translate-y-1) on hover with a shadow-lg.
Use Shadcn UI components for dropdowns, selects, tables, and modals.
Implement the chart components using Shadcn UI's chart primitives (Recharts).
Ensure the header is sticky with a glassmorphism effect (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F8F6]/70).
Include data-testid on every button, link, form input, and key informational element.
Colors: #5C745A (Moss Green) for positive/income, #C06B52 (Terracotta) for expenses/negative.
Use Phosphor icons for a clean, dense dashboard look.
